title: Wikisource Protestant texts: Westminster Confession of Faith
content:
Title: Westminster Confession of Faith
Source collection: Wikisource Protestant texts

The Humble Advice of the Assembly of Divines (1647), this is the first published printing of the confession, and includes references to the Bible. Irregular spelling and some patent errors are retained.
Confession of Faith Ratification Act 1690, full text as adopted by Scottish Parliament.
The Confession of Faith of the Assembly of Divines at Westminster, a 1946 transcription of the 1646 manuscript.
See also

Portal:Westminster Confession of Faith
